test-appsettings-2026-07-07.description: xUnit test project for AppSettings: 18 tests all green (net8.0). Makes SettingsFilePath internal for test isolation.

fix-monitor-index-2026-07-06.description: Fix IndexOutOfRangeException when monitors are unplugged. Build passes.

perf-mouse-coalesce-2026-07-06.description: Coalesce mouse hook dispatches using Interlocked.CompareExchange. Build passes.

fix-hotkey-notification-2026-07-06.description: Show tray balloon tip when RegisterHotKey fails. Build passes. Closes #65.

fix-persist-settings-2026-07-05.description: Persist Brightness, ColorTemperature, IsLightOn in AppSettings.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: safeoutputs create_pull_request returns success+patch but no PR number; branches exist but PRs may not be created as actual GitHub PRs
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs 'workflows' permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI. Test project targets net8.0 to avoid this.

notes: 2026-07-07 run (13:29 UTC): Tasks 3+2. Task 3: Combined fix — persist Brightness/ColorTemperature/IsLightOn + hotkey conflict balloon tip (build: 0 errors). Task 2: Only real issue #24 already has 2 RA comments with no new human activity. Monthly summary #103 updated.
